summary: Tested realtime quote-arrived notification feature. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend bell icon verified working with dropdown, unread badge, mark-read functionality, and navigation to RFQ detail.
seed_data_creation: Created test RFQ (RFQ-4MUOAT) and vendor quote to verify notification flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand notification feature fully tested. Key flows verified: (1) GET /api/brand/notifications returns notifications list + unread_count, (2) GET /api/brand/notifications/unread-count returns lightweight count for polling, (3) POST /api/brand/notifications/{id}/read marks single notification read with 404 for wrong user, (4) POST /api/brand/notifications/read-all marks all read, (5) E2E: Brand RFQ submit → Vendor quote → brand_notifications row created with correct fields (kind=quote_received, url=/enterprise/queries/{rfq_id}), (6) email_logs row created with kind=quote_received_brand status=sent, (7) B2C fallback: Customer RFQ quote creates email_logs with kind=quote_received_customer, (8) Frontend NotificationBell component renders in brand nav, shows red badge with unread count, opens dropdown on click, displays notifications with 'View & compare' links, Mark all read button works, clicking notification navigates to RFQ detail page.

notification_list_endpoint.details: GET /api/brand/notifications?limit=10 returns notifications array + unread_count, sorted newest-first

unread_count_endpoint.details: GET /api/brand/notifications/unread-count returns {unread_count: int} for lightweight polling

mark_read_endpoint.details: POST /api/brand/notifications/{id}/read marks notification read with read_at timestamp, returns 404 for non-existent/wrong-user notification

mark_all_read_endpoint.details: POST /api/brand/notifications/read-all marks all user's notifications read, returns modified count

e2e_brand_rfq_quote_notification.details: Brand RFQ (with brand_id stamped) → Vendor quote → brand_notifications row created with kind=quote_received, title contains vendor name + price + RFQ number, url=/enterprise/queries/{rfq_id}

email_fanout_brand.details: email_logs row created with kind=quote_received_brand, status=sent, recipients=[brand_admin emails], subject contains [New quote] + price + RFQ number

b2c_fallback.details: Customer RFQ (no brand_id) → Vendor quote → email_logs with kind=quote_received_customer, no brand_notifications row

frontend_bell_icon.details: NotificationBell renders in BrandLayout nav, shows red badge with unread count when > 0, polls /unread-count every 30s

frontend_dropdown.details: Click bell opens dropdown with 10 most recent notifications, each shows title + time ago + 'View & compare' link

frontend_mark_all_read.details: Mark all read button visible when unread > 0, clicking marks all read and updates UI

frontend_notification_click.details: Clicking notification marks it read and navigates to url (/enterprise/queries/{rfq_id})

mocked_apis.resend_email: Email sending via Resend is live (status=sent in email_logs)
